---
title: 'BlissCam: Boosting Eye Tracking Efficiency with Learned In-Sensor Sparse Sampling'
author:
- Yu Feng
- Tianrui Ma
- Yuhao Zhu
- Xuan Zhang
categories:
- Show All
- Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://horizon-lab.org/pubs/isca24-blisscam.pdf
journ: ISCA
year: 2024
contrib: Work (Co-)Led by Horizon Lab
image: featured.png
pub_number: 81
---
